---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that's broken or behaving unexpectedly
title: ""
labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## What happened

A clear, concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

Include the exact command line(s) and any relevant config snippets. Redact
session tokens, recording IDs, and account email if sharing logs.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Paste the full error message or unexpected output
inside a fenced code block.

## Environment

- OS: <e.g. Windows 11 24H2, macOS 14.5, Ubuntu 24.04>
- Python version: <output of `python --version`>
- plaud-tools version: <output of `plaud-tools --version`>
- Install method: <pip, editable from source, tray bundle>
- AI client (if relevant): <Claude Desktop / Claude Code / Codex / none>

## Additional context

Logs, screenshots, or anything else that might help. For security-sensitive
issues, please use the private disclosure process in
[SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) instead of filing a public bug.
